name: paper-research-workflow
description: Evidence-traceable scholarly search, citation expansion, open-PDF resolution, and visualization workflows powered by paper-search-cli.

interface.shortDescription: Search, verify, and visualize scholarly evidence.
interface.longDescription: Plan reproducible literature searches, query complementary scholarly sources, normalize and deduplicate papers, expand citation networks, resolve open PDFs, preserve evidence levels, and prepare bounded datasets for interactive visualization.
defaultPrompt: 检索一个主题并生成可追溯的阅读清单。
从一篇核心论文扩展引用网络并可视化。
比较多篇论文的方法、证据等级与局限。
